mnemonic:
victim ['vɪktɪm]
***
ЖЕРТВАМИ стали родители Вити. (это) victim

examples.eng: He was the victim of a freak accident.
He was the victim of an error.
She was a victim of blackmail.
He was a victim of circumstance.
All these people are innocent victims.
examples.ru: Все эти люди являются невинными жертвами.

examples.eng: He was a victim of circumstances.
The victim was hit by a hail of bullets.
The police have not yet ID'd the victim.
examples.ru: Полиция еще не установила личность жертвы.

examples.eng: One crash victim died, the other lived.
examples.ru: Один из потерпевших в аварии скончался, другой выжил.

examples.eng: The murder victim was asphyxiated.
She claimed to have been a victim of child abuse.
examples.ru: Она заявила, что в детстве была жертвой жестокого обращения.

examples.eng: The snake slimed his victim.
Our hearts go out to the victim's family.
examples.ru: Мы выражаем наши соболезнования семье погибшего.

examples.eng: The victim was pronounced dead on arrival.
examples.ru: Потерпевший был объявлен мёртвым по прибытии (в госпиталь).

examples.eng: He slit the throat of the victim.
She was the victim of an insurance scam.
examples.ru: Она стала жертвой мошенничества со страховкой.

examples.eng: an accident victim with severe head trauma
examples.ru: пострадавший в аварии с тяжёлой травмой головы

examples.eng: He was the victim of an administrative error.
The nurse quickly undressed the accident victim.
the victim of a racist attack
The victim was knifed to death.
the victim of a fraudulent scheme
Most homicide victims are under 30.
examples.ru: Возраст большинства жертв убийств — меньше тридцати лет.

examples.eng: She was the victim of a cruel hoax.
'Help,' the stabbing victim gurgled.
He was the victim of a savage attack.
He skewered his victim through the neck.
The mugger pulled a knife on his victim.
How did the murderer poison the victim?
He was the victim of an elaborate fraud.
examples.ru: Он пал жертвой искусно продуманного обмана.
